notes: Fretboard: mode switching is now a dropdown (and a swipe in fullscreen), practice patterns are Scale/3s-7s plus 2nd-16th interval drills with an up/down/up-down direction toggle, and random is gone. New Settings tab with dark/light/auto theme (auto follows your device). Tuner mic fixed on Android - the app was missing an audio permission; error messages now say what to actually do. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
